title: senecio squalidus var. aethnensis
intro: Senecio squalidus var. aethnensis, also known as Jacob's ladder, is a perennial plant in the family Asteraceae, native to Greece and Turkey. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a bitter and stimulate digestion, as well as its use as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. The health benefits of Senecio squalidus var. aethnensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant, often in the form of teas or infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
